litigation.mdlName: In re: Bard Implanted Port Catheter Products Liability Litigation
litigation.court: U.S. District Court, District of Arizona

phaseDetail: Federal Bard implanted port catheter cases are coordinated in MDL-3081 in the District of Arizona. Claims generally allege catheter fracture, migration, infection, thrombosis, embolization, or removal complications involving implanted port devices. Defendants dispute the allegations.

settlements.label: Global settlement
settlements.detail: No global public settlement has been announced for the federal MDL. Case value and eligibility depend on device proof, injury proof, causation, and individual facts.

keyDates.label: MDL-3081 established
keyDates.detail: JPML centralized federal Bard implanted port catheter cases in the District of Arizona.

keyDates.label: 3,376 actions pending
keyDates.detail: JPML's June 2026 monthly report listed 3,376 pending actions in MDL-3081.
